title: piper milleri
intro: Piper milleri, also known as long pepper or Indian long pepper, is a plant belonging to the Piperaceae family, similar to black pepper but with a different flavor and aroma. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The long pepper plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to help with respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Piper milleri is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional remedies such as powders and capsules.
